assertions.description: TextMetrics exposes selection-rect APIs when implemented and always exposes standard width metrics.
TextMetrics exposes substring bounding-box APIs when implemented and always exposes standard bounding box fields.
assertions.test: (()=>{const c=document.createElement('canvas').getContext('2d');const m=c.measureText('hello');return typeof m.getActualBoundingBox==='function'||('actualBoundingBoxLeft' in m&&'actualBoundingBoxRight' in m);})()

assertions.description: TextMetrics exposes getTextClusters when implemented, with Intl.Segmenter available as the standard grapheme fallback.
CanvasRenderingContext2D exposes fillTextCluster when implemented and always exposes fillText.
getSelectionRects returns an array-like when implemented; otherwise standard TextMetrics width remains readable.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const c=document.createElement('canvas').getContext('2d');const m=c.measureText('hello');if(typeof m.getSelectionRects!=='function')return typeof m.width==='number';const r=m.getSelectionRects(0,5);return r&&(Array.isArray(r)||typeof r.length==='number');}catch(_){return false;}})()
